no, mnuchin is ok . . its simple , 15 yrs ago. the geriatrics understood that the internet was like telephones. connections only, then my nerds taught them thaat cyber is a weapon. . same with the fed. . its a weapon to be used with sophistication. . inflation is a concept from the 50s , before the internet set instantaneious info around the world. . soooo dumb

subject: Re: Trump has discussed firing Fed chief after latest interest rate hike: report | TheHill
Re: Trump has discussed firing Fed chief after latest interest rate hike: report | TheHill
body:
In 1993, Powell began working as a managing director for Bankers Trust, but he quit in 1995 after the bank got into trouble when several customers suffered large losses due to derivatives. He then went back to work for Dillon, Read & Co.[15]

he didnt understand the markets 25 years ago. obama appointed him to the board. what else do you guys need to know
